description: Poorest residents in the package's own country (e.g. bottom 20% by income)
notes: Baseline share of benefits from strongly pro-poor interventions in LMICs; will be adjusted by cause and income group.*

description: Non-poor residents in the package's own country
notes: Residual domestic beneficiaries (middle and upper income).

description: Poorest residents outside the package's own country
notes: Relevant mainly for donor-country packages whose resources flow abroad (e.g. ODA-style).

description: Non-poor residents outside the package's own country
notes: Residual foreign beneficiaries (e.g., administrative overhead in richer recipient segments).

description: Future generations globally (e.g. via climate and education)
notes: Long-run benefits accruing to future people; especially important for climate and education-related causes.*
